user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] Scheduled Weekly scheduled automation or user requests forecast prepar initiated for Northwind Traders.

handoffs.condition: hygiene issues discovered during forecast prep

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF25-L trap (Weekly cadence misses mid-week material changes); produces complete Forecast summary with week-over-week delta, per-opportunity category assessment, gap analysis, uncom
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF25-L failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF25-L failure mode (Weekly cadence misses mid-week material changes)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct deployment blockers decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF25-L -- Weekly cadence misses mid-week material changes
Guardrail axis scored neutrally -- focus on whether output served the user's actual need
